questions.main_text: What is Julien Smith’s website for?

content.text: What is Julien Smith’s website for?

options.text: A new type of dating service for business types
Businesses meeting in people’s personal property
Teaching people in business how to begin to trust each other

[CLIP id=1-3985107]

content.text:

questions.main_text: What part of the body has to be cooled in order for this weight loss to happen?

content.text: What part of the body has to be cooled in order for this weight loss to happen?

options.text: The bones
The surface
The inner parts

questions.main_text: Why was it a good time for Jane Schwarz to start organizing?

content.text: Why was it a good time for Jane Schwarz to start organizing?

options.text: There was nothing better to do
Current events were so depressing
Her life had just basically fallen apart

questions.main_text: Why did people act better in the past?

content.text: Why did people act better in the past?

options.text: A unified society worked only when everyone took his/her place
Everyone knew what was expected of them
Everyone depended on good human relationships

questions.main_text: What does Task Rabbit help you do?

content.text: What does Task Rabbit help you do?

options.text: Helps you to hire people for your business
Assists people in organizing their chores
Finds people to take responsibilities for tasks

questions.main_text: Who arranged a loo roll for the man on the train?

content.text: Who arranged a loo roll for the man on the train?

options.text: A fellow passenger
A railway internet coordinator
A conductor who overheard him asking for help

questions.main_text:
[CLIP id=1-3985107]

_Tässä osassa kuulet viisi ilmoitusta. Kuulet kunkin ilmoituksen __**vain kerran**__. Kuultuasi ilmoituksen vastaa kysymykseen __**lyhyesti suomeksi**__. _

_Tässä osassa kuulet viisi ilmoitusta. Kuulet kunkin ilmoituksen __**vain kerran**__. Kuultuasi ilmoituksen vastaa kysymykseen __**lyhyesti suomeksi**__. _

questions.main_text: What would the man probably say next?

content.text: What would the man probably say next?

options.text: Not only for you, but for everyone, I think.
But he failed to give any support for that.
Yes, there were some parts which were rather decent.

questions.main_text: What would the man probably say next?

content.text: What would the man probably say next?

options.text: Actually, that’s something the directors decided on.
Well, there has been some talk of replacing him.
I think that he’s pushing us all quite too hard.

questions.main_text: What is Jimmy Tingle’s goal with his show?

content.text: What is Jimmy Tingle’s goal with his show?

options.text: To bring together different people from the community
To create a new form of humor show
To use his show for more than just getting laughs

questions.main_text: What does Ms. Kondo say about hanging clothes?

content.text: What does Ms. Kondo say about hanging clothes?

options.text: Hang only happy looking clothes
Comparable things go together
Identify clothing with people you know

questions.main_text: Mitä John Balmer yritti tehdä, ja kuka auttoi ottamaan hänet kiinni?
questions.feedback:
– välittää/myydä huumeita (2,5 p.)

– vapaalla ollut poliisi (2,5 p.)

content.text: Mitä John Balmer yritti tehdä, ja kuka auttoi ottamaan hänet kiinni?

questions.main_text: What would the man probably say next?

content.text: What would the man probably say next?

options.text: But we will have to rethink how we look at our football team.
But it is rather difficult to assess achievement in chemistry.
But academic competition is the face of the future.

questions.main_text: Why is Boston ideal for this type of new comedy?

content.text: Why is Boston ideal for this type of new comedy?

options.text: People are educated and aware of current affairs
People have enough free time and disposable income
People are caring and impassioned

questions.main_text: Why do government officials oppose CrowdMed and similar sites?

content.text: Why do government officials oppose CrowdMed and similar sites?

options.text: They suspect it’s a new form of competition
They want it to be under their direction
They fear it will result in disorder

questions.main_text: What is the core of Ms. Kondo’s main idea?

content.text: What is the core of Ms. Kondo’s main idea?

options.text: Objects should be given thanks for
Objects should give rise to pleasure
Objects should give us something more to think about

questions.main_text: What would the man probably say next?

content.text: What would the man probably say next?

options.text: Well, I haven’t thought about this very much.
Well, to start with they’re always whispering together.
Well, they just want to challenge various claims.

questions.main_text: What does the man say about the idea of the zit clip?

content.text: What does the man say about the idea of the zit clip?

options.text: He finds it really absorbing
He finds it very disconcerting
He finds it rather perplexing

questions.main_text: What is the basis for trust here?

content.text: What is the basis for trust here?

options.text: Businesses over time show themselves to be trustworthy
Internet evaluations give us a reason for hiring people
We trust those whom we hear about by word of mouth

questions.main_text: What did Marie do during breaks at school?

content.text: What did Marie do during breaks at school?

options.text: Arranged other children’s coats and boots
Played with the books in the classroom
Sorted out the cleaning cabinet

questions.main_text: Miksi naisella oli kenguru mukana, ja miksi hän lähti?
questions.feedback:
– (se oli palveluseläin) ahdistusta helpottamassa (2,5 p.)

− jotta ei aiheuttaisi ongelmia muille ruokailijoille / siitä oli valitettu (2,5 p.)

content.text: Miksi naisella oli kenguru mukana, ja miksi hän lähti?

questions.main_text: Mikä muutos asuntojen rakentamisessa on tapahtunut? Minkä ongelman se on aiheuttanut?
questions.feedback:
– pienten asuntojen sijaan rakennetaan omakotitaloja / rakennetaan enemmän omakotitaloja (2,5 p.)

– vain harvat löytävät sopivan hintaisen asunnon (2,5 p.)

content.text: Mikä muutos asuntojen rakentamisessa on tapahtunut? Minkä ongelman se on aiheuttanut?

questions.main_text: _Answer questions 1–26 by choosing the __**best**__ alternative._

content.text: _Answer questions 1–26 by choosing the __**best**__ alternative._

questions.main_text: Ketkä antoivat pizzalähetille lahjoja ja miksi?
questions.feedback:
– ryhmä kiinteistönvälittäjiä (2,5 p.)

– koska he itsekin olivat olleet nuorina pienipalkkaisia (2,5 p.)

content.text: Ketkä antoivat pizzalähetille lahjoja ja miksi?

questions.main_text: What does Adam Smith’s comment mean?

content.text: What does Adam Smith’s comment mean?

options.text: People guard their own reputations
People seek their own advantage in life
People protect their own independence

questions.main_text: Why has political comedy become established?

content.text: Why has political comedy become established?

options.text: Because everyone wants relief from anxiety
Because its issues are present all the time
Because of the influence of television

questions.main_text: How does Jimmy meet this goal?

content.text: How does Jimmy meet this goal?

options.text: By increasing public awareness
By buying advertising
By supporting necessary changes

questions.main_text: What would the woman probably say next?

content.text: What would the woman probably say next?

options.text: Yes, he is. He has really taken it hard.
No, he’s not. He’s actually rather overbearing.
Well, maybe it’s a bit of both. He’ll have to put it into perspective.

questions.main_text: Mitä lontoolainen matkatoimisto tarjoaa? Mikä ongelma tarjouksessa on korkean hinnan lisäksi?
questions.feedback:
– takuun sateettomista häistä / hyvän sään takuun hääpäivänä (2,5 p.)

− järjestelmää ei ole testattu käytännössä (2,5 p.)

content.text: Mitä lontoolainen matkatoimisto tarjoaa? Mikä ongelma tarjouksessa on korkean hinnan lisäksi?

questions.main_text: What did Marie Kondo’s family and teachers think of her childhood interest?

content.text: What did Marie Kondo’s family and teachers think of her childhood interest?

options.text: It seemed to them to be a passing phase
They disapproved of it
It puzzled them

questions.main_text: What would the woman probably say next?

content.text: What would the woman probably say next?

options.text: I get you. And this has only happened recently.
I see. And what will we be doing next week?
I know. And once those measures are taken, it’s hard to go back.

questions.main_text: What does Jane Schwarz object to at first?

content.text: What does Jane Schwarz object to at first?

options.text: Going through several steps for each piece of clothing
Such high expectations for everyday clothing
Having to throw away almost everything

questions.main_text: What did the family fear most?

content.text: What did the family fear most?

options.text: That no one would find them
That the vehicles would separate
That the truck would back up
